description: Fresh retained screen baseline on the current evaluator fingerprint.
label: baseline-latent-toxic-v1

change_summary: Add a slow filtered floor memory, reroute shared spread from instant event carry to accumulated floor carry, and keep fast burst pricing side-directed.
decision_summary: delta -127.114681 did not clear promotion margin 20.595502
description: State pivot: add a slow filtered floor accumulator for the symmetric baseline, remove instantaneous shared event carry, and keep fast stress charging on the toxic side.
label: vol-accumulator-side-tax-v1

change_summary: Restore the incumbent shared spread structure, keep the slow filtered floor memory, and limit the new state to a persistent floor carry instead of broad cheapening.
decision_summary: delta -103.828873 did not clear promotion margin 22.379130
description: Refine the state pivot by restoring the incumbent shared floor weights and using the slow accumulator only as the shared carry replacement while keeping fast event pricing side-directed.
label: vol-accumulator-side-tax-v2

change_summary: Drive the slow floor from the original event signal, increase persistence, and soften release so the state pivot changes timing instead of deleting the protective floor.
decision_summary: delta -101.987061 did not clear promotion margin 22.549112
description: Refine the state pivot by smoothing the original event signal into a slower floor accumulator and using that smoothed memory for shared carry while leaving fast directional burst pricing intact.
label: vol-accumulator-side-tax-v3

change_summary: Add a persistent drawdown-shell budget in slot 11, move symmetric protection into a shared stress shell, and charge continuation risk through a toxic-side extension instead of a single pooled spread.
decision_summary: delta -172.652052 did not clear promotion margin 17.620784
description: Risk-budget pivot: replace the pooled spread with a small persistent floor, a slowly decaying shared drawdown shell, and a toxic-side extension while keeping the state estimator and opportunity path fixed.
label: drawdown-budget-shell-v1

change_summary: Increase the persistent floor and stress-shell coefficients, reintroduce moderate bilateral risk protection, and keep one-sided extension spend on the toxic side to avoid the v1 cheap-mode collapse.
decision_summary: delta -141.028931 did not clear promotion margin 19.430758
description: Refine the drawdown-budget shell by restoring a stronger shared floor and moderate bilateral protection while keeping the persistent shell budget and toxic-side extension.
label: drawdown-budget-shell-v2

change_summary: Remove shared calm rebate and broad opportunity cuts; add a one-sided recovery corridor driven by passive calm confirmation and toxicity gating.
decision_summary: delta -0.520747 did not clear promotion margin 20.049273
description: Replace shared calm rebates with a narrow non-toxic recovery corridor gated by repeated calm confirmation and low active toxicity.
label: recovery-corridor-auction-v1

change_summary: Restore incumbent calm rebate and side opportunity cuts; add a strict reconvergence-gated corridor increment on the non-toxic side, capped to removable spread flex and closed on renewed toxicity.
decision_summary: delta -0.000056 did not clear promotion margin 20.043403
description: Restore incumbent shared calm rebate and opportunity spine, then add a tightly gated one-sided corridor increment on the non-toxic side with a hard toxicity close and flex cap.
label: recovery-corridor-auction-v2

change_summary: Reduce symmetric hazard/event carry, move one-sided protection into explicit toxic-side overlays, and add an inventory-centering shift that widens the toxic side while cheapening the non-toxic side only under calm gates.
decision_summary: delta 12.087490 did not clear promotion margin 20.305024
description: Replace the smoothed additive quote map with a tri-channel assembly: lighter persistent floor, stronger toxic-side protection overlay, and a calm-gated inventory-centering shift that cannot oppose the toxic side.
